{{CargoRelic
|name=My Only Desire
|class_id=21143
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=A 15th-century French tapestry, considered the "Medieval Mona Lisa," housed in the Musée de Cluny in Paris. It features a lady and a unicorn, symbolizing chastity and the rejection of sensual temptation. The intricate craftsmanship and rich symbolism make it a French national treasure.
|fame=70
|art=107
|fth=71
|civ=64
|tech=50
|ss1=Orange Fragments fusing, unlock SSS Prize Pool<br>Orange Fragments fusing, chance to obtain SSS Relics +0.3%<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +3%<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +12<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss2=Orange Fragments fusing, unlock SSS Prize Pool<br>Orange Fragments fusing, chance to obtain SSS Relics +0.4%<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +4%<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +16<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss3=Orange Fragments fusing, unlock SSS Prize Pool<br>Orange Fragments fusing, chance to obtain SSS Relics +0.5%<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +5%<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +20<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss4=Orange Fragments fusing, unlock SSS Prize Pool<br>Orange Fragments fusing, chance to obtain SSS Relics +0.7%<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +7%<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +28<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss5=Orange Fragments fusing, unlock SSS Prize Pool<br>Orange Fragments fusing, chance to obtain SSS Relics +0.9%<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +9%<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +36<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss6=Orange Fragments fusing, unlock SSS Prize Pool<br>Orange Fragments fusing, chance to obtain SSS Relics +1.2%<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +12%<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +48<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000
|ss7=Orange Fragments fusing, unlock SSS Prize Pool<br>Orange Fragments fusing, chance to obtain SSS Relics +1.2%<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +12%<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +48<br>Wishes Made: 2000/2000<br>When you Wish, get 1 Taichi Fish by +10% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill III.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, DMG +30%
|skill2=[[File:Yamato skill III.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, B-tads gained +15%
|skill3=[[File:Yamato skill III.png|50px]]Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, Snail RUSH +600
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Noblewoman and Rare Beast|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +3|orange}}
|3name=Maid|3rec=1.66M|3atk=29691|3defense=19580|3hp=289298|3weak=8034
|4name=Lion|4rec=3.27M|4atk=44444|4defense=29308|4hp=585816|4weak=10699
|5name=Unicorn|5rec=6.05M|5atk=62763|5defense=41389|5hp=1051679|5weak=13170
|6name=Noblewoman|6rec=10.68M|6atk=85460|6defense=56356|6hp=1794842|6weak=16483
|Arec=18.02M|Aatk=112782|Adefense=74374|Ahp=2906689|Aweak=19251
}}}}
